title: Path to Understanding Connectedness in Metric Spaces
description: A flowchart showing the progression of prerequisite knowledge needed to understand connectedness, the core concepts of connectedness itself, and the practical resources for learning it.
elements: Learning Resources (Textbooks, Online Lectures, Problem Sets)
relationships: Prerequisite Knowledge is necessary to understand the Core Concept
The Core Concept leads to the discovery of Key Results
Learning Resources provide the material to study the Core Concept and Key Results
Engaging with Learning Resources leads to Assessment & Mastery
